segments.text: This is a situation where they need to keep that aggressive pressure going
segments.original_text: ガンガン前へと詰めていかなければいけないという展開にはなるでしょう

segments.text: But they're still staying calm, managing it well
segments.original_text: しかしそれでも冷静にさばいてくる

segments.text: Here, responding to the hydrant with the apple
segments.original_text: ここで消火栓に対してリンゴで対応していこうという

full_text: We're at 3:30 now. This is a situation where they need to keep that aggressive pressure going. But they're still staying calm, managing it well. Nakashiro. Here, responding to the hydrant with the apple. Dropping apple. I see.
